description: A list of caption resources associated with the specified video.
name: CaptionListResponse

kind.description: Identifies the API resource's type. Value is youtube#captionListResponse.

items.description: A list of captions that match the request criteria.
A caption resource represents a YouTube caption track. A caption track is associated with exactly one YouTube video.

kind.description: Identifies the API resource's type. Value is youtube#caption.

id.description: The ID that YouTube uses to uniquely identify the caption track.

snippet.description: The snippet object contains basic details about the caption.

videoId.description: The ID of the video that the caption track is associated with.

lastUpdated.description: The date and time when the caption track was last updated.

language.description: The language of the caption track. The property value is a BCP-47 language tag.

name.description: The name of the caption track.

audioTrackType.description: The type of audio track associated with the caption track.

isCC.description: Indicates whether the track contains closed captions for the deaf and hard of hearing.

isLarge.description: Indicates whether the caption track uses large text for the vision-impaired.

isEasyReader.description: Indicates whether caption track is formatted for easy reader.

isDraft.description: Indicates whether the caption track is a draft.

isAutoSynced.description: Indicates whether YouTube synchronized the caption track to the audio track in the video.
